codeReview.summary: The feature improves the home page styling and carousel timing, but it does not fully satisfy the expected behavior because the search bar polish was applied only on the home page instead of all tab pages required by the fulfilled validation assertion.

issues.description: The feature claims to fulfill `VAL-ADD-002`, which requires the refined search bar styling to be consistent across Goods, Football, Basketball, and Concert pages, but the implementation only updates the goods search bar component and this commit touches no search components for the other tab pages.

summary: Review failed: home page carousel and product card polish are implemented, but the feature over-claims fulfillment of `VAL-ADD-002` because the refined search bar styling was not applied across all tab pages.
